title: One-on-ones in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger one-on-ones in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: One-on-ones in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: One-on-ones in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good one-on-ones in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
One-on-ones in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
